name: Beauty Kit
description_html:
Unlock your true potential and embrace a life filled with vibrancy and energy with our exclusive Beauty Kit. Carefully curated to provide you with everything you need for inner radiance and optimal performance, this bundle combines two powerhouse products designed to elevate your health and well-being.

  1. Collagen Powder with Electrolytes: Revitalize your inner glow with our Collagen Powder blend. Infused with collagen peptides and essential electrolytes, it nourishes skin, hair, nails, and joints while boosting energy and performance.

  2. Hydration Pills: Elevate your hydration game with our Electrolyte Recovery Plus Hydration Pills. Packed with six electrolytes, zinc, and Vitamin B6, they replenish lost nutrients for sustained energy and vitality.

Whether you're looking to enhance your beauty from within or optimize your performance, this bundle is for you.

name: Collagen Peptides Powder With Electrolytes
description_html: Ready to let your inner radiance shine? Collagen Powder with Electrolytes, a hydration aid featuring a blend of collagen peptides and electrolytes, helps promote healthier skin, hair, nails, and joint flexibility, as well as supporting greater energy levels and improved physical performance.

name: Collagen Peptides with Electrolytes Powder
description_html:
Stay hydrated and look amazing with our collagen + electrolytes combo! 

Packed with 10g of pasture-raised collagen peptides and 5 essential electrolytes, it’s designed to keep your skin glowing, joints moving, and body feeling balanced. Plus, antioxidant-rich Vitamin C boosts collagen regeneration and immune health. 

Mix it into your water or favorite drink—it’s quick, easy, and all about making you feel your best.

name: Creatine with Electrolytes Powder (Unflavored)
description_html: Fuel your workouts with Key Nutrients Creatine with Electrolytes. Boost muscle growth, enhance performance, and stay hydrated. Shop now!

name: Electrolyte Hydration Pills (capsule form)
description_html:
Ultimate Keto Electrolyte Hydration Capsule is essential for health, longevity, and performance. Water isn't enough. You need a balanced mix of all 6 electrolytes to replenish the minerals lost in your daily routine. Electrolyte Recovery Plus Hydration Pills are the answer you need. These electrolyte capsules are the perfect solution for convenient hydration.

Loaded with 6 electrolytes, plus zinc and Vitamin B6, Electrolyte Recovery Plus Hydration Pills provide an easy, taste-free way to replenish lost nutrients. For additional hydration needs, consider pairing with one of our many electrolyte powder flavors.

name: Electrolyte Recovery Plus Powder (Sugar-Free)
description_html:
• Easy to Mix Hydration Drink - Key Nutrients’ Electrolyte Powder is the perfect hydration mix for all. Suitable for all ages and diets, everyone can enjoy our caffeine-free drink mix. Free from artificial colors and sweeteners, give your immune system the extra boost to fight off illness, fatigue and hangovers!
  • Electrolytes You Can Trust - Hydrate your body, regulate nerve & muscle function and rebuild damaged muscle tissue with 6 key electrolytes: Magnesium, Potassium, Calcium & more. Enriched with 12 additional vitamins, this electrolyte mix drink is free from artificial colors and sweeteners.
  • Zero Calories & Carbs, Keto & Paleo Diet Friendly - Sweetened with Organic Stevia Extract, our drink mix is sugar free and has zero calories. Feel right and great without the guilt.
  • Replenish & Rehydrate Your System - Feeling drained after a commute or all-nighter? Along with releasing toxins, our bodies also lose important electrolytes when we sweat. Replenish essential vitamins and re-hydrate your system with Key Nutrients’ ultimate Keto Electrolytes Powder.

name: Electrolyte Recovery Plus Powder Travel Packets
description_html: A tasty electrolyte powder with ZERO carbs, sugar, or calories. Take daily for energy, hydration, and keto diet support — anytime, anywhere.

options.name: Flavor
values: Variety - Blue Raspberry, Pink Lemonade, Lemonade, Cherry Pom, Peach Mango
Variety - Pineapple Coconut, Passion Fruit, Blueberry Lemonade, Lemon Lime, Acai Berry

name: Electrolytes Powder Variety Pack
description_html: Hydrate smarter anywhere. These electrolyte sticks deliver 6 essential electrolytes + 10 vitamins and minerals to support recovery, balance, and performance. Zero sugar. Zero calories. Big flavor variety.

name: Gut Health
description_html: A smarter way to support gut health and hydration every day.

name: Lights Out Sleep Aid
description_html:
A blend of melatonin, GABA, and natural herbs Lights Out Sleep Aid helps you fall asleep quickly, rest deeply, and wake up refreshed.

  • Melatonin, GABA, and 5-HTP support natural sleep cycles
  • Non-habit forming herbs like valerian root, lemon balm, and passionflower help you relax
  • Non-GMO ingredients and manufactured in a GMP-certified facility
  • Backed by our ironclad 60-day risk-free guarantee.

name: Matcha Powder with Electrolytes
description_html:
Looking for a delicious way to stay hydrated and energized?

Our science-based Matcha Green Tea Powder blends matcha extract powder with 5 essential electrolytes for energy, focus, and hydration to help you tackle the day! Indulge in the rich, savory flavor of finely ground green tea leaves. With less than 25mg of caffeine per serving, this zero-sugar, unsweetened matcha powder is a great alternative to jittery pre-workout and sugary drinks. Perfect for sustained performance and daily wellness.

name: Peach Mango Lover
description_html:
Introducing the perfect bundle for peach mango lovers:

  1. Electrolyte Recovery Plus Powder (Sugar-free): Replenish and hydrate with our trusted blend of 6 essential electrolytes and 12 vitamins. Zero calories and carbs, perfect for Keto and Paleo diets.

  2. Collagen Peptides Powder with Electrolytes: Enhance your radiance with collagen peptides and electrolytes. Boost skin, hair, nails, and joints while supporting energy levels and performance.

Get yours now!

name: Pre-Workout Powder with Electrolytes
description_html:
Power up every rep with our energizing pre-workout formula!

Packed with 150 mg of clean caffeine from tea, plus Beta-Alanine, Citrulline Malate, and 5 electrolytes, it fuels your endurance, sharpens focus, and keeps hydration in check.

With a bold blue raspberry flavor, it’s your ultimate pre-workout partner to hit every goal, prevent cramps, and recover like a champ.

name: Unflavored Liquid Electrolyte Drops
description_html: Transform any beverage into a vitality-boosting powerhouse with unflavored liquid electrolyte drops.
